## Summary

Describe the user-visible workflow change.

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] I considered the state, evidence, approval, and recovery boundary.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, private evidence, or a real deployment target.
- [ ] I preserved agent-neutral behavior or documented an adapter-specific change.

## Verification

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Ruff format/check
- [ ] `git diff --check`
